milestone: first full self-improvement loop verdict, end to end
chain: pxx --propose --auto (mine 50 runs -> validated candidate) -> pxx --evaluate-candidate (both-arms live corpus -> compare) -> ELIGIBLE (human-gated)
honest_caveat: The 18-case margin is against a deliberately FP-prone baseline (blocking+Qwen3, fp 0.75): advisory rescues the reviewer's false-positive spins/rejects at corpus scale — the r5/sweep-2 finding quantified (18/30). It does NOT measure advisory vs the shipped blocking+7b default (7b finds nothing, so it would pass most cases too). Real, correct gain against THIS baseline; the machine already runs advisory, so this confirms the pipeline produces correct verdicts rather than prompting a new action.
significance: The system auto-proposed a fix from its own run history, evaluated it on real loops, and returned a correct evidence-backed promotion verdict — with a human still deciding. Milestone B's loop is closed end to end.
